summary: Iteration 50: Verified all 8 Safari bug fixes. Login flow works end-to-end (no blank cream screen). All 4 bottom nav routes render content. Mobile wordmark width=140px. ISO button uses amber colors (not blue). AuthContext loading resolves properly with 3s safety timeout. ProtectedRoute renders visible bg-honey-cream div. Bottom nav uses standard React Router Link components.

issues: ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED errors appear when navigating - likely external resource loading issues (Discogs API images)

passed_tests: 1. Login flow works: login page -> Hive page with content (232k chars, not blank cream screen) - VERIFIED
2. All 4 bottom nav routes reachable after login: /hive (232k), /explore (307k), /collection (1.1M), /honeypot (285k) - VERIFIED
3. Mobile top bar wordmark has min-width 140px: measured width=140.0px, height=40.0px - VERIFIED
4. ISO composer button has amber-100 background with amber border/text: classes='bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border border-amber-300' (NOT blue) - VERIFIED
5. AuthContext loading state resolves within 3 seconds: AUTH RESOLVED messages within ~1s, safety timeout at 3s - VERIFIED
6. ProtectedRoute renders visible div (bg-honey-cream) during loading - VERIFIED in code review (App.js lines 45-52)
7. Bottom nav items are standard React Router Link components: all 4 nav items render as <a> tags with proper href - VERIFIED
8. Route navigation between all pages works via direct URL navigation - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: App.js ProtectedRoute (lines 45-52): Correctly renders <div className='min-h-screen bg-honey-cream' /> during loading, NOT null
AuthContext.js (line 16): loadingResolved ref prevents loading from being set true again after initial resolve
AuthContext.js (lines 50-53): Safety timeout 3 seconds forces loading=false if auth hangs
Navbar.js (line 194): Mobile wordmark img has min-w-[140px] max-w-[160px] classes
Navbar.js (lines 250-264): Bottom nav uses React Router <Link> components (rendered as <a> tags)
ComposerBar.js (line 216): ISO chip changed from bg-blue-100 to bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border border-amber-300
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50: All Safari mobile bug fixes verified. Key findings: 1) Login->Hive flow works without blank cream screen, 2) All 4 bottom nav routes render substantial content, 3) Mobile wordmark exactly 140px wide (min-width requirement met), 4) ISO button correctly uses amber colors instead of blue, 5) AuthContext safety timeout at 3s works properly, 6) ProtectedRoute renders visible bg-honey-cream div during loading, 7) Bottom nav uses standard Link components. Minor note: ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED console errors appear (external resource loading) but don't affect functionality.
